error.signature: OSError: Can't load tokenizer for 'model-name'. Make sure the model identifier is correct.
error.regex: (Can't load tokenizer|OSError.*tokenizer|not a valid model identifier|Tokenizer class.*not found|does not appear to have.*tokenizer)

verdict.summary: Hugging Face cannot load tokenizer. Model name typo, private/gated model, or missing tokenizer files.

dead_ends.action: Download tokenizer files manually from the Hub and load locally
dead_ends.why_fails: Manual download may miss files (special_tokens_map, tokenizer_config) causing subtle errors

dead_ends.action: Use a different tokenizer assuming they are interchangeable
dead_ends.why_fails: Tokenizers are model-specific. Using wrong tokenizer produces wrong token IDs and garbage outputs.

workarounds.action: Check exact model name on huggingface.co/models
Login with access token for gated/private models
workarounds.how: huggingface-cli login  # or use_auth_token=True in from_pretrained()

workarounds.action: Specify revision/branch if model has multiple versions
